text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Mental Health Evaluation * Children 16 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adolescents Children Adolescents Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues AIDS/HIV Issues Children Domestic Violence Issues Grade School Students Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Immigration Issues Infants/Toddlers LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Older Adults Perinatal Depression Veterans 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details JULIETTE'S HOUSE TRAUMA RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health modalities for children and families who have experienced abuse and trauma. Offers counseling, case management, parenting education, and individual and family trauma-informed therapy. Focuses on the most current, evidence-based interventions that promote healing, collaboration, and increased well-being. Also provides resource options, parenting groups, teen support groups, and wellness groups. 1075 SW Cedarwood Avenue Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Children and non-offending care providers who have experienced abuse and trauma Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-9866 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFESTANCE HEALTH LIFESTANCE HEALTH BEAVERTON CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations; Therapists work together with clients to achieve mutually agreed upon goals. Offers comprehensive psychiatric assessments as well as on-going medication management as part of mental health treatment. 11010 SE Division Street Suite 202 Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Serves children under the age of 18 in Multnomah County and youth under age 24 in Clackamas County. Must have OHP to qualify for services. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm (503) 335-5975 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Child Center offers comprehensive mental health assessments for individuals experiencing difficulties at home, school, or in the workplace. Additional assessments may screen for substance abuse, trauma, medical health, risk of harm, and diagnostics. Upon completion, clients may recieve mental health diagnosis, service plan with treatment goals, recommendations for level of care, and wellness referrals. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 726-1465 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES CORVALLIS DAY TREATMENT INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides psychiatric residential treatment and outpatient therapy. Services include psychiatric assessment, medication management, individual, family, and/or group therapy and skills training. Services offered on campus or in the community with 24/7 crisis response for families. 4455 NE Highway 20 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 whose mental health conditions impact life Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, crisis services 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 813-7760 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides psychiatric residential treatment and outpatient therapy. Services include psychiatric assessment, medication management, individual, family, and/or group therapy and skills training. Services offered on campus or in the community with 24/7 crisis response for families. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, crisis services 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 813-7760 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides therapy, psychiatric treatment, medication management, psychiatric assessment, treatment groups, skills training, and case management. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-18 whose mental health conditions impact their ability to be successful in their homes, schools, and communities. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (503) 234-9591 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNIVERSITY OF OREGON UNIVERSITY OF OREGON HEDCO CLINIC CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health assessments and counseling services for children. Approach is family-centered, with special attention toward supporting parents as they learn to address the needs of their children. Services are provided by doctoral students in the second to fourth years of doctoral training in Counseling, School, or Clinical Psychology. 1655 Alder Street Suite 170 Eugene, OR 97403 Eligibility: Ages 2-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-8pm, Friday 9am-7pm Email (541) 349-0923 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JULIETTE'S HOUSE TRAUMA RECOVERY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES UNIVERSITY OF OREGON CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER
